code:
%%{FinTech_TransactionQueue}}}%%
journey
    title GCP Text-to-SQL Deployment Roadmap
    section Initialization
      Create GCP Project: 5: User
      Enable Required APIs: 5: User
      Set up Billing: 5: User
    section Infrastructure Setup
      Configure Cloud SQL Database: 5: User
      Set up Secret Manager: 5: User
      Configure Networking: 5: User
    section Model Deployment
      Choose Model Hosting Strategy: 5: User
      Deploy Model to Vertex AI or Compute Engine: 5: User
      Test Model Endpoint: 5: User
    section Backend & Frontend
      Build FastAPI Backend: 5: User
      Deploy Backend to Cloud Run/GKE: 5: User
      Build Next.js Frontend: 5: User
      Deploy Frontend: 5: User
    section Integration & Security
      Connect Backend to Database: 5: User
      Implement Authentication: 5: User
      Configure API Gateway: 5: User
    section Monitoring & Optimization
      Set up Cloud Monitoring: 5: User
      Configure Alerts: 5: User
      Optimize Costs: 5: User
    section CI/CD
      Set up Cloud Build: 5: User
      Configure Deployment Pipeline: 5: User
      Automate Releases: 5: User
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Text-to-SQL项目画一个完整的部署路线图，用journey图来展示从初始化到最终上线的全流程。整个流程要覆盖GCP上的基础设施搭建、模型部署、前后端开发、集成安全、监控优化以及CI/CD这几个大阶段。
明白，journey图适合展示用户旅程。我确认一下：每个阶段的具体任务都是User来执行，评分都是5分吗？还有，模型部署那里，Vertex AI和Compute Engine是二选一都要体现出来？
elements_involved: Deploy Model to Vertex AI or Compute Engine

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 对，所有任务都是User执行的，评分统一5分。模型部署那里保留两种选项，用"Vertex AI or Compute Engine"体现灵活性。另外Backend部署也类似，用"Cloud Run/GKE"表示可选方案。
elements_involved: Deploy Model to Vertex AI or Compute Engine

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 好的，我先搭建框架。第一块Initialization放三个任务：创建GCP项目、启用API、设置计费。第二块Infrastructure Setup配置Cloud SQL数据库、Secret Manager和网络。这样基础设施层就齐了。
接下来模型部署部分，加上选择托管策略、部署模型、测试端点。然后Backend & Frontend这块要完整：FastAPI后端、部署到Cloud Run或GKE、Next.js前端、部署前端。
elements_involved: Deploy Model to Vertex AI or Compute Engine

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 已添加。现在加上Integration & Security：后端连数据库、实现认证、配置API Gateway。然后是Monitoring & Optimization：Cloud Monitoring、告警配置、成本优化。
最后CI/CD部分，Cloud Build、部署流水线、自动化发布。等等，我确认一下标题——应该是"GCP Text-to-SQL Deployment Roadmap"对吧？
标题已设为"GCP Text-to-SQL Deployment Roadmap"。全部7个阶段、21个任务都已就位，每个都是User执行、评分5分。整个journey图从项目初始化贯穿到自动化发布，结构清晰。
